relations.note: Charts/tables use uniform corners instead of the asymmetric accent shape.
Adds within-email consistency requirement for the accent-shape radii.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

rules.intent: Establish and lock the signature accent-shape container geometry across surfaces.
rules.rule_text: The Brand Accent Shape is the core container device: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii, while the other two corners keep a slight radius. It houses callout text and photography and reads modern and optimistic. Approved radius pairs (print): large containers/photos 1.25" & 0.0625", banners 0.5" & 0.0625", small callout boxes 0.4375" & 0.0625". Email px conversions (at 96dpi): large 120px & 6px, banner 48px & 6px, callout 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right) and the 6px radius to the other pair; default large radius top-left & bottom-right.

quotes: Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Keep the accent-shape rounding visually consistent throughout a single email.
rules.rule_text: Be consistent within an email: use the same diagonal orientation of the accent-shape radii across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right, 6px radius on the other pair).

quotes: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
**Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Charts/tables are exempt from the asymmetric accent shape and use a uniform corner radius.
rules.rule_text: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (chart.container.radius = 12px uniform), not the asymmetric accent shape.
